hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo "$TOOL_INPUT"); echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-(r)?f\s+/|rm\s+-f\s*-r\s+/|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|git\s+push\s+.*--force\s+(origin\s+)?(main|master))' && echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected: $CMD" && exit 1 || true

grep -rn 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE\|ALPACA_SECRET\|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\|ALPACA_API_KEY\|FINNHUB_API_KEY\|ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' frontend/ 2>/dev/null && echo '⚠️  WARNING: API key reference found in frontend code!' || true
